description_long: This is a small, pale bird with a compact body and a short, straight beak. Its plumage is predominantly off-white to very light beige, with subtle hints of peach or cream, especially around the face and chest. The bird has round, reddish eyes and slender, dark brown legs with sharp claws. Its wings are neatly folded along its sides, and the tail is short and squared at the tip, with visible feather separations. The beak is conical and pale blue-gray, blending smoothly into the face. The overall appearance is soft and delicate, with smooth feathering and a gentle color gradient across the body.
description: A small, pale bird with off-white plumage, a short conical beak, reddish eyes, and a squared tail. Its feathers are smooth and subtly gradient from cream to light beige.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's symmetrical body, pale blue-gray beak, and both reddish eyes clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth gradient of the plumage, the rounded head, and the folded wing detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the squared tail shape and the even, light coloration of the back and tail feathers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the beak profile, eye, and the layered wing feathers.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid pale with subtle gradient and faint mottling on the chest
